0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","$L2",null,{"tag":{"_id":"React","name":"React","slug":"React"},"posts":[{"_id":"nextjs-tutorial","title":"Next.js 入门教程","slug":"nextjs-tutorial","content":"\r\n# Next.js 入门教程\r\n\r\nNext.js 是一个基于 React 的全栈框架。\r\n\r\n## 为什么选择 Next.js？\r\n\r\n1. **服务端渲染（SSR）**\r\n2. **静态生成（SSG）**\r\n3. **API 路由**\r\n4. **零配置**\r\n\r\n## 快速开始\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpx create-next-app@latest my-app\r\ncd my-app\r\nnpm run dev\r\n```\r\n\r\n打开 http://localhost:3000 查看结果。\r\n\r\n## 核心概念\r\n\r\n### 文件系统路由\r\n\r\nNext.js 使用文件系统路由，在 `app/` 目录下创建文件即可创建路由。\r\n\r\n### 数据获取\r\n\r\n- `getStaticProps` - 静态生成\r\n- `getServerSideProps` - 服务端渲染\r\n- `getStaticPaths` - 动态路由\r\n\r\n## 总结\r\n\r\nNext.js 让全栈开发变得简单！\r\n","excerpt":"学习 Next.js 的基础知识","coverImage":"","category":{"name":"教程","slug":"教程"},"tags":[{"name":"Next.js","slug":"Next.js"},{"name":"React","slug":"React"},{"name":"前端","slug":"前端"}],"author":{"name":"Admin","email":"admin@example.com"},"published":true,"views":0,"createdAt":"2026-04-27","updatedAt":"2026-04-27"}]}],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0.ub.mqxohrez.js","async":true}]],["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","$4",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@5"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"Kg7cuSMyiseKqXRM-wecf"}
